title: launaea cabrae
intro: Launaea cabrae, also known as the spiny leaf chrysocoma, is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Launaea cabrae include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Launaea cabrae are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
